title: Phase 16.11 — GSC Token Recovery + Validate Fix + Page 2 Push + Asset/Outreach Execution — FINAL REPORT

executed_vs_planned.executed: 5 new blog link entries across 4 T1 calculators — targeted highest-impact pages (ECB mortgage, emergency fund, credit card debt)
executed_vs_planned.explanation: 170 links was an overestimate from Phase 16.10. The existing decision-links and blog-links already cover most pages well. The 5 additions fill specific gaps where high-impression blog pages had zero inbound links from indexed T1 calcs.

biggest_blocker: GSC TOKEN DEAD — dominates everything. Cannot detect first click. Cannot pull fresh data. Cannot verify CTR fix impact. Qasem re-auth is the single highest-priority action.
next_autonomous_action: Phase 16.12 — Deploy verification complete → Verify asset #2 via 15-point checklist → Build linkable-asset-2-build-log.json → Apply remaining CTR fixes if token fixed → Send Jun 13 follow-ups to 17 prospects
